response.original_title: The Girl in the Bush by the Woodsman’s House
response.overview: When a group of friends finds a peculiar girl buried in a bush by the Woodsman’s cabin, they do everything they can to save her - including revenge.  Young friends Helena, Agnes, and Edith travel an eldritch forest in search of firewood, but come across something much stranger: a girl, around their age, growing from a poppy bush. Even odder, she seems to be alive! Throughout the course of the film, the girl’s secrets unravel. It must have something to do with the cabin next to the bush where they found her, and the “Woodsman” who lives inside.
response.title: The Girl in the Bush by the Woodsman’s House
